title: Cake Pvp
description: A vanilla cake themed texture pack for every pvp gamemode
body:
**Cake PvP**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- PVP-focused texture pack with a default minecraft texture cake texture theme. for every gamemode of pvp ---
**What the pack looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/klDJ0aZi/images/420a7efa1e3676720957b8806469e6f00f9ecc93.png)
--- Includes the default cake texture themed items for most items and netherite items and for diamond thing's it has a pancake themed textures with syrup and butter on the armor and tools ( the axe looks really cool) when anchors are uncharged they look like a cake that wasnt frosted yet and then when you fill it the frosting and cherries appear on top like the cake. and the pack also includes small totems for pvp and low fire. Gamemodes supported - Sword - Axe - Mace - Crystal Pvp - Works for UHC - Nethpot - Pot - Smp - CartPvp have any questions? need help? **Then join my Discord!**
